source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Calm product UI typography with precise numerals and Japanese guidance tuned for field notes, cataloging, and soft desert interfaces.
layout: 8px grids, compact mineral-facet cards, sand-soft panels, dusty borders, petal-crystal radii, and restrained basin shadow.

prompts.label: Transparent gypsum rose motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Desert Rose transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a gypsum rose mineral motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A natural desert rose gypsum crystal cluster from a sandy basin, with rosette petal-like blades, sand tan translucent gypsum edges, beige sediment inclusions, soft petal crystal shadows, chalky mineral texture, slightly frosted facets, and delicate layered radial growth. Geological accuracy; mineral desert rose, not a flower.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full gypsum rosette cluster without cropping. Clean studio lighting that preserves tan crystal translucency; no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no rose flower, no plant, no jewelry, no hand, no landscape, no vase, no fantasy glow, no text, no watermark, no loose gemstones, no other minerals dominating.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Desert Rose light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Desert Rose", derived from a gypsum rose mineral motif. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible soft desert UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, preferred 3840x2160 feel, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Desert Rose, Gypsum Rose, Sandy Basin, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from gypsum desert rose crystals: sand tan petal blades, creamy gypsum highlights, beige basin dust, warm clay seams, taupe crystal shadows, and soft translucent petal edges. The board must read as a gypsum rose mineral, not a flower.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Field Notes. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: soft desert system, shadcn/tweakcn-style product UI, 8px radius with subtle petal-crystal facets, warm sand backgrounds, tan primary actions, clay-accent active states, pale gypsum panels, taupe borders, precise grid, subtle sandy crystalline texture, calm accessible contrast.
Palette names to show: Basin Sand, Charcoal Umber, Petal Tan, Gypsum Cream, Clay Rose, Crystal Shadow, Dust Veil, Selenite White, Dune Moss.
Theme colors to use: Basin Sand #f6efe3, Charcoal Umber #2f261f, Petal Tan #c99a6a, Gypsum Cream #ead8bd, Clay Rose #b98272, Crystal Shadow #766052, Dust Veil #d8c8b2, Selenite White #fffaf0, Dune Moss #8a8b67.
Constraints: no rose flower imagery, no plant, no cactus, no western theme, no orange/brown monotone overload, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon, no unrelated saturated colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Desert Rose", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Desert Rose dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Desert Rose". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from a gypsum rose mineral motif.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, preferred 3840x2160 feel, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Desert Rose, Gypsum Rose, Dark Mode, Sandy Basin, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve gypsum desert rose character: sand tan petal blades, creamy gypsum highlights, beige basin dust, warm clay seams, taupe crystal shadows, soft translucent petal edges, and sandy crystalline texture. The board must read as a gypsum rose mineral, not a flower.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Field Notes. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep charcoal umber background, warm crystal-shadow cards, selenite foreground text, petal tan buttons, gypsum cream charts, clay rose active accents, dune moss success states, dusty borders, subtle translucent mineral veils, calm soft desert tone, accessible contrast.
Palette names to show: Basin Sand, Charcoal Umber, Petal Tan, Gypsum Cream, Clay Rose, Crystal Shadow, Dust Veil, Selenite White, Dune Moss.
Theme colors to use: Basin Sand #f6efe3, Charcoal Umber #2f261f, Petal Tan #c99a6a, Gypsum Cream #ead8bd, Clay Rose #b98272, Crystal Shadow #766052, Dust Veil #d8c8b2, Selenite White #fffaf0, Dune Moss #8a8b67.
Constraints: no rose flower imagery, no plant, no cactus, no western theme, no orange/brown monotone overload, no neon orange, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic purple/blue gradients, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Desert Rose".
